TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Al Bonniwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1911, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 10, Al Bonniwell, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2002) pinqbaqan nya Al Bonniwell mqwas biru sa Lower Merion pqwsan biru seneng, Ardmore, Pennsylvania, U.S. Al Bonniwell, t'aring kawas tay 1932 tehuk kawas tay 1935, mqwas biru sa Dartmouth pqwsan biru krahu, Hanover, New Hampshire, United States. qnxan nya Al Bonniwell maki tay kawas 1949 msqun ki Maxine (1922вЂ“2007). mintzyuwaw nya Al Bonniwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 1937, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

К¦~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oК¦~КЁiation plajers~Й•
S.FORM: Al Bonniwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1911, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 10, Al Bonniwell, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2002) pinqbaqan nya Al Bonniwell mqwas biru sa Lower Merion pqwsan biru seneng, Ardmore, Pennsylvania, U.S. Al Bonniwell, t'aring kawas tay 1932 tehuk kawas tay 1935, mqwas biru sa Dartmouth pqwsan biru krahu, Hanover, New Hampshire, United States. qnxan nya Al Bonniwell maki tay kawas 1949 msqun ki Maxine (1922вЂ“2007). mintzyuwaw nya Al Bonniwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 1937, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
